name: USS Pinon (AN 66)
events: 29 Aug 1961 The USS Pinon was decommissioned at San Diego 5 March 1946, and was struck from the Navy List 20 March 1946. Sold and placed in merchant service as the Alaska Reefer, she was sunk on 29 August 1961. She now lies in 15'-50' of water south of the Ammunition Dock on Indian Island, Port Townsend Bay, Washington, US. ( http://www.boydski.com/diving/wreck_dives.htm - Puget Sound wrecks). (1)
